title: Kaths Path Remover
description: A simple new item to remove Path blocks, Podzol or Mycelium and turns it back into dirt.
body:
| Bugs&News | All Projects | |-|-| | | | |[Direct link](https://discord.gg/vGY3PePuVd)|[Direct link](https://modrinth.com/user/Kathezel)| --- # What does it do/add? This pack is adding a easy way to turn **Paths, Podzol or Mycelium into dirt** again without the player needing to replace the block or place something on it. Only a simple but now not useless wooden shovel is needed! # How to... ### ...craft the item: Use a wooden shovel in any crafting grid and you be able to craft the *Path Remover 1x1* ### ...change the area: [1.20.5+] If you right click it, while not looking at a block, you'll be able to change the radius of the Path remover to 3x3 and back to 1x1. [1.17 - 1.20.4] With the 1x1 look straight UP to change it to 3x3 With the 3x3 look straight DOWN to change it to 1x1 ### other features: Looking at grass, podzol, mycelium, dirt or path blocks will show a visual effect on the ground as an indicator of the range.
Pictures ### Craftig ![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/btcGkWUk/images/c12c1ea5cc0694a855a988ae88109c012eb13527.png) ### 1x1 effect ![1x1 effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/btcGkWUk/images/32fd480e4a345a106fe834a42af7b4c93d825cb6.png) ### 3x3 effect ![3x3 effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/btcGkWUk/images/b57d688181283e870b4eed575c152c9f19e886a8.png)
# Note for content creators: I'm interested in seeing people playing and/or giving feedback on my Datapacks. So if you are creating a video of any kind with or about my datapacks, I would be really happy to get notified on my discord about it, so I can see your feedback. Also if you allow me to, I would put it on the Modrinth page, so others can see a first impression. **This is not necessary, you don't have to!**
